title: Buildah reports "permission denied"
body:
**Description**

Buildah report "permission denied" on my Ubuntu 22.04 server.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**
1. Create Dockerfile which contains following content.

```
FROM scratch
WORKDIR /bin
```

2. Execute following command to create container image.

`buildah bud .`

3. Buildah report following error message.

```
container $ buildah bud .
STEP 1/2: FROM scratch
STEP 2/2: WORKDIR /bin
error building at STEP "WORKDIR /bin": copier: mkdir: error checking directory "/bin": mkdir /bin: permission denied
ERRO[0000] exit status 125
```

**Describe the results you received:**

error building at STEP "WORKDIR /bin": copier: mkdir: error checking directory "/bin": mkdir /bin: permission denied
ERRO[0000] exit status 125

**Describe the results you expected:**

A container image shall be created:

```
STEP 1/2: FROM scratch
STEP 2/2: WORKDIR /bin
COMMIT
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob 14e1cc72a9eb done  
Copying config 52334a03c0 done  
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
--> 52334a03c0d
52334a03c0ddf47684061543840bef2b71e1c6209da53e108ee573b38d4d0e92
```

**Output of `rpm -q buildah` or `apt list buildah`:**

```
container $ apt list buildah
Listing... Done
buildah/jammy,now 1.23.1+ds1-2 amd64 [installed]
```

**Output of `buildah version`:**

```
Version:         1.23.1
Go Version:      go1.17
Image Spec:      1.0.1
Runtime Spec:    1.0.2-dev
CNI Spec:        0.4.0
libcni Version:  
image Version:   5.16.0
Git Commit:      
Built:           Thu Jan  1 08:00:00 1970
OS/Arch:         linux/amd64
BuildPlatform:   linux/amd64
```

**Output of `podman version` if reporting a `podman build` issue:**

```
(paste your output here)
```

**Output of `cat /etc/*release`:**

```
DISTRIB_ID=Ubuntu
DISTRIB_RELEASE=22.04
DISTRIB_CODENAME=jammy
DISTRIB_DESCRIPTION="Ubuntu 22.04.1 LTS"
PRETTY_NAME="Ubuntu 22.04.1 LTS"
NAME="Ubuntu"
VERSION_ID="22.04"
VERSION="22.04.1 LTS (Jammy Jellyfish)"
VERSION_CODENAME=jammy
ID=ubuntu
ID_LIKE=debian
HOME_URL="https://www.ubuntu.com/"
SUPPORT_URL="https://help.ubuntu.com/"
BUG_REPORT_URL="https://bugs.launchpad.net/ubuntu/"
PRIVACY_POLICY_URL="https://www.ubuntu.com/legal/terms-and-policies/privacy-policy"
UBUNTU_CODENAME=jammy
```

**Output of `uname -a`:**

```
Linux ctu-hig1 5.15.0-52-generic #58-Ubuntu SMP Thu Oct 13 08:03:55 UTC 2022 x86_64 GNU/Linux
```

**Output of `cat /etc/containers/storage.conf`:**

```
[(paste your output here)](cat: /etc/containers/storage.conf: No such file or directory)
```

comments.body: It works if using "sudo buildah bud ."
Could you please share output `buildah info` as well. Thank you :)

Hi @shengjiangwuqq , does your current user have write permission to the graph root `/folk/swu/.local/share/containers/storage` ? I think not and that's why it works with sudo and not with the regular user.

Hi @flouthoc , 

Thanks for your update.  

I confirmed that I have permission to access /folk/swu/.local/share/containers:

```
ctu-hig1: workspace $ tree /folk/swu/.local/share/containers
/folk/swu/.local/share/containers
└── storage
    ├── mounts
    ├── overlay
    │   └── l
    ├── overlay-containers
    │   ├── containers.json
    │   └── containers.lock
    ├── overlay-images
    │   └── images.lock
    ├── overlay-layers
    │   ├── layers.json
    │   └── layers.lock
    ├── storage.lock
    ├── tmp
    └── userns.lock

8 directories, 7 files
ctu-hig1: workspace $ ll /folk/swu/.local/share/containers
total 4.0K
drwx------ 8 swu users 4.0K 12月 28  2022 storage/
ctu-hig1: workspace $ 
```

@flouthoc Yes, I have write permission here. BTW, I can success build it with **docker build .** but fail to build with **buildah bud .**

```
ctu-hig1: container $ docker build .
Sending build context to Docker daemon  2.048kB
Step 1/2 : FROM scratch
 ---> 
Step 2/2 : WORKDIR /bin
 ---> Running in f37733b7878e
Removing intermediate container f37733b7878e
 ---> 0cb7a4243300
Successfully built 0cb7a4243300
ctu-hig1: container $ buildah bud .
STEP 1/2: FROM scratch
STEP 2/2: WORKDIR /bin
error building at STEP "WORKDIR /bin": copier: mkdir: error checking directory "/bin": mkdir /bin: permission denied
ERRO[0000] exit status 125 
```
Could you share debug log `buildah --log-level debug build` ?

Hi @flouthoc ,

Thanks for your update. Please check the output below, thanks. 
(I moved container folder to **/ctu-hig1_02/swu/container**)

```
swu@ctu-hig1:/ctu-hig1_02/swu/container$ buildah --log-level debug build
DEBU[0000] running [buildah-in-a-user-namespace --log-level debug build] with environment [SHELL=/bin/bash LC_ADDRESS=zh_CN.UTF-8 LC_NAME=zh_CN.UTF-8 LC_MONETARY=zh_CN.UTF-8 PWD=/ctu-hig1_02/swu/container LOGNAME=swu XDG_SESSION_TYPE=tty MOTD_SHOWN=pam HOME=/folk/swu LC_PAPER=zh_CN.UTF-8 LANG=en_US.UTF-8 SSH_CONNECTION=128.224.98.161 60268 128.224.96.31 22 XDG_SESSION_CLASS=user LC_IDENTIFICATION=zh_CN.UTF-8 TERM=xterm-256color USER=swu DISPLAY=localhost:20.0 SHLVL=1 LC_TELEPHONE=zh_CN.UTF-8 LC_MEASUREMENT=zh_CN.UTF-8 XDG_SESSION_ID=18533 XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/run/user/17185 SSH_CLIENT=128.224.98.161 60268 22 LC_TIME=zh_CN.UTF-8 XDG_DATA_DIRS=/usr/share/gnome:/usr/local/share:/usr/share:/var/lib/snapd/desktop PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin:/usr/games:/usr/local/games:/snap/bin:/folk/swu/.local/bin DBUS_SESSION_BUS_ADDRESS=unix:path=/run/user/17185/bus SSH_TTY=/dev/pts/34 LC_NUMERIC=zh_CN.UTF-8 OLDPWD=/ctu-hig1_02/swu _=/usr/bin/buildah TMPDIR=/var/tmp _CONTAINERS_USERNS_CONFIGURED=1 BUILDAH_ISOLATION=rootless], UID map [{ContainerID:0 HostID:17185 Size:1} {ContainerID:1 HostID:165536 Size:65536}], and GID map [{ContainerID:0 HostID:100 Size:1} {ContainerID:1 HostID:165536 Size:65536}] 
DEBU[0000] Pull Policy for pull [ifnewer]               
DEBU[0000] overlay storage already configured with a mount-program 
DEBU[0000] [graphdriver] trying provided driver "overlay" 
DEBU[0000] overlay: mount_program=/usr/bin/fuse-overlayfs 
DEBU[0000] backingFs=nfs, projectQuotaSupported=false, useNativeDiff=false, usingMetacopy=false 
DEBU[0000] FROM "scratch"                               
STEP 1/2: FROM scratch
DEBU[0000] [graphdriver] trying provided driver "overlay" 
DEBU[0000] overlay: mount_program=/usr/bin/fuse-overlayfs 
DEBU[0000] backingFs=nfs, projectQuotaSupported=false, useNativeDiff=false, usingMetacopy=false 
DEBU[0000] [graphdriver] trying provided driver "overlay" 
DEBU[0000] overlay: mount_program=/usr/bin/fuse-overlayfs 
DEBU[0000] backingFs=nfs, projectQuotaSupported=false, useNativeDiff=false, usingMetacopy=false 
DEBU[0000] [graphdriver] trying provided driver "overlay" 
DEBU[0000] overlay: mount_program=/usr/bin/fuse-overlayfs 
DEBU[0000] backingFs=nfs, projectQuotaSupported=false, useNativeDiff=false, usingMetacopy=false 
DEBU[0000] overlay: mount_data=,lowerdir=/folk/swu/.local/share/containers/storage/overlay/fb9128f2b080cb30fada0a07f8e8b56cc406477305e6990656884c60e2d8c673/empty,upperdir=/folk/swu/.local/share/containers/storage/overlay/fb9128f2b080cb30fada0a07f8e8b56cc406477305e6990656884c60e2d8c673/diff,workdir=/folk/swu/.local/share/containers/storage/overlay/fb9128f2b080cb30fada0a07f8e8b56cc406477305e6990656884c60e2d8c673/work,volatile 
DEBU[0000] Container ID: 72647e5899520f15efec9d1e1a59b74bd7416d1e1f213e5a0cfdf78547c5581e 
DEBU[0000] Parsed Step: {Env:[PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin] Command:workdir Args:[/bin] Flags:[] Attrs:map[] Message:WORKDIR /bin Original:WORKDIR /bin} 
STEP 2/2: WORKDIR /bin
DEBU[0000] error building at step {Env:[PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin] Command:workdir Args:[/bin] Flags:[] Attrs:map[] Message:WORKDIR /bin Original:WORKDIR /bin}: copier: mkdir: error checking directory "/bin": mkdir /bin: permission denied 
DEBU[0000] [graphdriver] trying provided driver "overlay" 
DEBU[0000] overlay: mount_program=/usr/bin/fuse-overlayfs 
DEBU[0000] backingFs=nfs, projectQuotaSupported=false, useNativeDiff=false, usingMetacopy=false 
error building at STEP "WORKDIR /bin": copier: mkdir: error checking directory "/bin": mkdir /bin: permission denied
DEBU[0000] overlay storage already configured with a mount-program 
DEBU[0000] shutting down the store                      
DEBU[0000] [graphdriver] trying provided driver "overlay" 
DEBU[0000] overlay: mount_program=/usr/bin/fuse-overlayfs 
DEBU[0000] backingFs=nfs, projectQuotaSupported=false, useNativeDiff=false, usingMetacopy=false 
ERRO[0000] exit status 125  
```
@shengjiangwuqq Could you update to latest buildah, I am wondering why is your buildah is not falling back to using `native overlay`.

Hi @flouthoc ,

The buildah was installed by using **apt-get install buildah** and it is the latest version. Do you mean I have to rebuild it from source code? Thanks.

Hi @flouthoc ,

I have a good news for this issue that I found a solution for this. I moved folder /folk/swu/.local/share/containers to local disk and created an symbol link for it:

`lrwxrwxrwx 1 swu users 40 12月 29  2022 /folk/swu/.local/share/containers -> /ctu-hig1_02/swu/.local/share/containers/`

The folder **/folk/swu/.local/share/containers** is on NFS not local disk. Now I was success to build container image without sudo. 

Thanks for your help on this! :-)
